hero.h2: Orb Chain Blitz: 6 Player Offline Board Game
hero.p: Start the Chain. Rule the Chaos

faq.title: FAQ
faq.a1: Yes, the game is free with optional in-app purchases.
faq.a2: Yes, you can enjoy it without internet.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.p: This is the Contact Us page for Orb Chain Blitz.
contact.body:
If you have any feedback, suggestions, complaints, or need any information regarding Orb Chain Blitz, we would be happy to hear from you.

You can reach out to us anytime via email:

📧 rohittjhaa356@gmail.com

Thank you for supporting Orb Chain Blitz!

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.p: This is the Terms & Conditions page for Orb Chain Blitz.

intro.title: 1. Introduction
intro.p1: This Privacy Policy describes how Orb Chain Blitz ("the Game") handles information when you use the mobile application developed and published by Rohit Kumar Jha, an individual developer based in India ("Developer", "we", "our", or "us").
intro.p2: Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains what information is collected, how it is used, and your rights regarding your data.
intro.p3: By using the Game, you agree to the practices described in this Privacy Policy.

personal.title: 3.1 Personal Information
personal.p2: We do not intentionally collect personally identifiable information from users.

auto.title: 3.2 Automatically Collected Information
auto.p1: The Game uses third-party services that may automatically collect certain non-personal data to improve performance and support advertising.

third.title: 4. Third-Party Services
third.p1: The Game integrates the following third-party services:

firebase.title: Google Firebase
firebase.p2:
Firebase may collect anonymized usage and diagnostic data.
Learn more: https://firebase.google.com/support/privacy

admob.title: Google AdMob
admob.p1: Used to display advertisements within the Game.
admob.p2: AdMob may collect and use data such as:
admob.p3:
This helps deliver relevant advertisements.
Learn more: https://policies.google.com/privacy

permissions.title: 5. Permissions
permissions.p1: The Game may use standard device permissions required for normal app functionality, including:
permissions.li1: Internet access (for ads and analytics services)
permissions.p2: The Game does not intentionally access:

children.title: 6. Children's Privacy
children.p1: Orb Chain Blitz is suitable for a general audience and may be played by children. The Game does not knowingly collect personal information from children.
children.p2: If a parent or guardian believes that a child has provided personal information, they may contact us and we will promptly address the issue.

offline.title: 7. Offline Gameplay
offline.p1: The core gameplay of Orb Chain Blitz works fully offline. However, internet connectivity may be used optionally by third-party services such as advertising and analytics.
offline.p2: Local multiplayer features operate only on the same device and do not transmit data online.

sharing.title: 8. Data Sharing
sharing.p1: We do not sell or share personal information with third parties.
sharing.p2: Data may be processed by third-party service providers (Firebase and AdMob) solely for:

security.title: 9. Data Security
security.p1: We take reasonable steps to protect user information through trusted third-party platforms provided by Google services.
security.p2: However, no method of electronic storage or transmission is completely secure.

rights.title: 10. User Rights
rights.p1: Depending on your location, you may have rights to:
rights.li2: request deletion of data processed through third-party services
rights.li3: opt out of personalized advertising through device settings
rights.p2: Users can reset or limit advertising IDs through their device privacy settings.

changes.title: 11. Changes to This Privacy Policy
changes.p1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.
changes.p2: Users are advised to review this policy periodically.

contact.title: 12. Contact Us
contact.p1: If you have any questions or concerns regarding this Privacy Policy, you may contact:
